## PR 8: Deterministic UX Progress Translation Map

### Scope

Fixes the evaluation progress display so the user-facing bar is pinned to canonical backend milestones while showing only editorial, author-facing language.

### Why

The existing progress display still used elapsed-time interpolation and older labels like `Preparing manuscript`, `Analyzing manuscript`, and `Reconciling passes`. That allowed the visual bar to drift independently of hard gates and did not represent the new Eval 2.0 Story Layer / Review Gate / Approval Normalizer architecture.

This PR replaces that behavior with a deterministic UX translation map:

- backend phase/artifact truth in
- author-facing editorial label out
- fixed milestone width
- no technical phase/pass/artifact jargon shown to users
- Review Gate and blocked Story Layer states are hard stops

### User-facing milestone map

- Calibration → `Calibrating benchmark models...` → 10%
- Manuscript ingest → `Ingesting manuscript & mapping chapters...` → 25%
- Story Layer build → `Extracting core narrative footprint...` → 45%
- Review Gate → `Awaiting Story Layer Approval` → 60%
- Blocked Review Gate → `Story Layer Blocked: Narrative conflicts detected` → 60%
- Approval Normalizer → `Freezing approved narrative matrix...` → 65%
- Phase 2 diagnostics → `Running deep structural craft diagnostics...` → 80%
- Report assembly → `Assembling evaluation matrix...` → 90%
- Final cross-checks → `Running final structural cross-checks...` → 95%
- Complete → `Evaluation complete!` → 100%

### In scope

- Replace time-interpolated stage budgets with a deterministic UX milestone map.
- Support current backend `phase`, `phase_status`, and `cross_check_status` signals.
- Prepare for additive future signals: `current_stage`, `latest_artifact_emitted`, and `is_blocked_by_gate`.
- Add tests proving Review Gate hard-stops at 60% and does not leak backend jargon.

### Out of scope

- Backend SSE.
- New DB fields or migrations.
- Processor/runtime changes.
- Artifact writer changes.
- Story Layer Review Gate UI shell work.
- Direct changes to evaluation execution.

### Files changed

- `components/evaluation-poller-display.ts`
- `__tests__/components/evaluation-poller-display.test.ts`

### Tests added

- Calibration maps to author-facing benchmark copy.
- Manuscript ingest avoids phase/pass jargon.
- Story Layer build maps to narrative-footprint language.
- Review Gate hard-stops at 60%.
- Blocked Story Layer state hard-stops at 60% with blocked tone.
- Accepted ledger/support artifacts map to deep diagnostics.
- Phase 3/3A and Phase 4 map to report assembly/final cross-checks.
- Milestone percentages are fixed, not time-interpolated.

### Reviewer note

This PR is intentionally independent of the stacked Story Layer PR chain. It fixes the live progress display on `main` while making the display compatible with the new Eval 2.0 backend milestones as those fields become available.
